---
title: "RT-BarnesHut: Accelerating Barnes-Hut Using Ray-Tracing Hardware"
date: 2025-02-28
year: 2025
pdf: "https://dl.acm.org/doi/pdf/10.1145/3710848.3710885"
venue: "PPoPP 2025"
award: ""
code: ""
slides: ""
preprint: ""
video: ""
author:
  - name: Vani Nagarajan
  - name: Rohan Gangaraju
  - name: Kirshanthan Sundararajah
  - name: Artem Pelenitsyn
  - name: Milind Kulkarni
categories:
  - Conference
description: ""
---
